creator: maho@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'd like to request two repocopy as following.
editors/openoffice.org-2 -> editors/openoffice.org-3 
editors/openoffice.org-2-RC -> editors/openoffice.org-3-RC

Reason:
According to http://wiki.services.openoffice.org/wiki/OOoRelease30 , 
OpenOffice.org 3.0 beta is scheduled to release at
> OpenOffice.org 3.0 Beta: April 30th, 2008

I'd like to port it to FreeBSD as usual, and I have been prepared for it
by creating openoffice.org-3-devel port.

Plan:
For ports tree I'll treat BETA as usual release version. Namely,
OpenOffice.org 3.0 BETA will be committed to editors/openoffice.org-3,
and some milestones BEA300_m1, m2... and so on will be committed
to editors/openoffice.org-3-RC port.

When a release (non-beta) branch will be created, milestones are committed
to openoffice.org-3-RC, and release tag will be committed to openoffice.org-3.
